PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-18-2022 Continued To Aug-29-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jeffrey Lowe, via Zoom, for Eric Rosenquist, Petitioner; John Streett, via Zoom, for Jane Eckert, Objector/Respondent.

The court queries counsel regarding participating in mediation. The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than Aug-12-2022. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by Aug-19-2022. The Parties are to return on Aug-29-2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation. The matter is continued to the same date. Counsel is to monitor the Court's register of actions to obtain a copy of the Minute Order Referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Gomez. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Sep-29-2021 Continued To Dec-13-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jeffrey Lowe, via ZOOM, for Eric Rosenquist, Petitioner; John Streett, via ZOOM, for Jane Eckert, Objector.

The court begins by querying counsel as to why there has been no response to the Examiner's notes. Mr. Loew reports that he filed a creditor's claim which was rejected by the Objector in this matter. He does not believe that the Estate has any assets and plans to file a trust petition. The court then asks Mr. Loew if the court can take this matter off calendar or if he needs additional time with this case but is advised that if it is continued, he is instructed to reply to the Examiner's notes. Mr. Lowe requests a continuance to discuss this matter with Mr. Streett.

The Petition for Letters of Administration is continued to Dec-13-2021 at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Loo. Not reported.
